steps.tool_output: SOLUTION_SUBMITTED: Fixed three critical bugs: 1) Trimmed 'Bearer ' prefix in ValidateToken, 2) Changed timestamp format to use hyphens to avoid extra pipes in payload, 3) Used hmac.Equal for secure signature comparison. submit_explanation: SOLUTION_SUBMITTED: Fixed three critical bugs: 1) Trimmed 'Bearer ' prefix in ValidateToken, 2) Changed timestamp format to use hyphens to avoid extra pipes in payload, 3) Used hmac.Equal for secure signature comparison.
